name: generate_image
description: Generate images using Gemini/Imagen with an optional vision-based critique loop for quality assurance.

prompt_or_file.description: The text prompt for image generation or a path to a markdown file containing an 'image_prompt' frontmatter field.

output.description: The destination path for the generated image (e.g. 'output/hero.webp').

critique.description: Specific critique instructions or a path to a critique file. If omitted, the tool uses default quality checks or a local 'critique.md'.

no_critique.description: If true, skips the vision-based critique loop and saves the first result immediately.

force.description: If true, overwrites existing files at the output path without erroring.

json.description: Return output as a JSON object.
